title: Automations - Duplicate item on multiple boards

posts.author: Max1 (G)
posts.cookedHtml:
Dear all,

I have created an automation for an item to duplicated in 2 separate boards when a status changes. The issue is that only one item is being moved to one of the other boards. The other copy just stays in its original board.

Does anyone have an idea why?

Thank you for your help

Best regards,

Max

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @Max1

Welcome to the community! Hard to tell without the exact automation you are using. In general if you use something like this:

when something happens 
move item to here and then 
move item to there

I guess the item will never arrives “there” as it is already to “here” when the automation is running. I guess you need to duplicate on the original boards and then run the move on every duplicate.

posts.author: aspurlock (Amy Spurlock)
posts.cookedHtml:
Can you create two distinct automations?

-when something happens, then duplicate the item, and then move item to Board 1
-when something happens, then duplicate the item, and then move item to Board 2

posts.author: rodneyz (Rodney)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @Max1 , why not have the same item “live” on multiple boards? This feature is not available yet in monday but due to popular demand from the users, we have developed an app that does that. Link to our App in the Marketplace We would love for you to try our app

posts.author: Fortimus_Team (Fortimus)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Max1

We actually built an app specifically for this use case. Mirror Item Multiple Boards lets you:

  • Keep one item synced across unlimited boards
  • Update anywhere, changes reflect everywhere instantly
  • Add subitems, comments, and files in the sync
  • Exclude certain columns
  • See live sync status in using the sync table feature

How it works: You just select an item, choose which boards to mirror it to, and that’s it. Any updates sync automatically in real-time.
